title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model supporting 70+ languages with real-time multilingual translation and automatic language detection. The model is available via the Gemini API, Google Translate mobile apps, and Google Meet Private Preview.
writeup: Google for Developers introduces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model that supports more than 70 languages with real-time multilingual translation and automatic language detection. The model is reachable through the Gemini API, the Google Translate mobile apps, and a Google Meet Private Preview, which extends the same translation capability across developer integrations and consumer products. Key takeaways: translation runs directly between spoken inputs and outputs, language detection is automatic rather than manually selected, and access spans an API alongside two end-user surfaces.
